title: Simple Sword Cane
body:
_As you walk in the woods you see a small shop. You don't know how it got here, but it's your only option..._
> ![Merchant... asleep](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fe5ba64e47cad92599650e7f2270a7b36f7a754.png)
> 
> Huh..?
> OH! Hello Traveler!
> Didn't get guests often, what do you desire?
![Just merchant](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d12d7c79ffe8ba0a619710fed0d5f3d1f9cfe217.png)
> 
> So.. i see you're in nead of something reliable and practical?
>
> Well then...
>
>![Merchant with a cane](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed275398f9323e032abc2ce9463f570d0d971b04.png)
>
> Take this cane, It will be handy in your adventures...


This mod adds 2 new items:
Cane - Speeds you up when held in main hand.

And a Cane-Sword - Unsheated blade, basically just an iron sword.

To switch between the modes you just right-click.

You can use mods like JEI to look recipe.


Why would you need this mod..?
For aethstetic! because regular cane mods are boring nowadays...


I was asked so here's 'nother discord link :p 
[https://discord.gg/4gWDnnfXKc](https://discord.gg/4gWDnnfXKc)
